ssim.note: Not ideal for atlas registration: assumes similar local contrast between images, which is often violated in histology-to-atlas comparisons.

ncc.note: Not ideal for atlas registration: assumes a linear intensity relationship between images, which breaks down across different modalities or stainings.

mi.note: Recommended metric for atlas registration: measures statistical dependency between intensity distributions, making it robust to cross-modality and cross-stain comparisons.
